examples: She says it takes about 18 months to reintegrate them into their communities.
Only by facing up to the past and apologizing for one's actions, as Tsukiko does, can a person reintegrate their psyche.
More than 100, 000 former combatants have been disarmed and myriad organisations run projects to reintegrate them into civilian life.
After World War II pan-European cooperation was seen as the best way to reintegrate Germany.
They continue to show this when they come home, trying to reintegrate into civilian life.
